name: Real Estate Lead Capture & Instant AI Follow-Up

parameters.content:
## Real Estate Lead Capture & Instant AI Follow-Up

### How it works

This workflow captures a new real estate lead from a web form, enriches it with configured business and agent details, and standardizes the lead data. It then sends the lead context to an OpenAI-compatible AI service to generate an instant follow-up response and supporting agent summary. Finally, it emails the lead, notifies the agent, and logs the interaction to a Google Sheets-based CRM.

### Setup steps

- Configure the webhook endpoint and connect it to the lead capture form on the website.
- Update the Settings node with the correct businessName, agentName, agentEmail, and bookingLink values.
- Configure the AI request details, including the OpenAI-compatible endpoint URL, model, API key, and any required headers.
- Connect Gmail credentials for both the lead reply and agent notification nodes.
- Connect Google Sheets credentials and select the target spreadsheet and sheet for CRM logging.

### Customization

Adjust the normalization and AI prompt code to match the fields collected by the web form, the desired follow-up tone, qualification criteria, and CRM columns.

## Capture and prepare lead

Receives a new real estate lead from the web form, applies business and agent settings, and normalizes the submitted lead details for downstream processing.

## Generate AI follow-up

Builds the OpenAI-compatible request, sends the lead context to the AI endpoint, and parses the AI response into usable follow-up content and lead insights.

## Send and record outcomes

Uses the parsed AI output to immediately email the lead, notify the agent, and log the lead plus follow-up details to a Google Sheets CRM.
